---
title: "FLORA Converter — Notebook Test"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)

library(tidyverse)
library(readr)

```

## Load the converter

```{r}
source("flora_converter.R")
```

# load data convert
```{r}

data <- csv_to_flora_json("flora.csv")
df   <- flora_json_to_df(data)

# Fix encoding immediately after loading
df <- df |>
  mutate(across(where(is.character), \(x) iconv(x, from = "latin1", to = "UTF-8", sub = " "))) |>
  mutate(across(where(is.character), \(x) str_replace_all(x, "[^\x01-\x7F]", "-"))) |>
  mutate(across(where(is.character), \(x) str_replace_all(x, "\\s+", " "))) |>
  mutate(across(where(is.character), \(x) trimws(x)))

# Select 50 random rows
rand_doi <- sample(df$doi_o, 200)
df_rand50 <- df |> filter(doi_o %in% rand_doi)



```


# process
1. convert json back to data frame
2. clean up so that only non na doi_o and value in either doi_r or url_r
3. new csv file for output
4. for each unique doi_o generate row with reference, outcome, outcome quote and outcome source columns, column with message. If multiple doi_r should include all in message.

```{r}
generate_flora_messages <- function(df) {
  messages <- list()

  for (doi in unique(df$doi_o)) {
    rows <- df[df$doi_o == doi, ]
    n    <- nrow(rows)

      n_replications  <- sum(tolower(rows$type) == "replication", na.rm = TRUE)
      n_reproductions <- sum(tolower(rows$type) == "reproduction", na.rm = TRUE)
      
      attempt_text <- if (n_reproductions == 0) {
        if (n_replications == 1) "there is 1 replication attempt" else paste0("there are ", 
                                                                              n_replications, " replication attempts")
      } else if (n_replications == 0) {
        if (n_reproductions == 1) "there is 1 reproduction attempt" else paste0("there are ", 
                                                                            n_reproductions, " reproduction attempts")
      } else {
        paste0("there are ", n_replications,
               if (n_replications == 1) " replication attempt" else " replication attempts",
               " and ", n_reproductions,
               if (n_reproductions == 1) " reproduction attempt" else " reproduction attempts")
      }
      
      header <- paste0(
        "According to data from the FORRT Library of Reproduction and Replication Attempts (FLoRA), ",
        attempt_text,
        " of a finding from this study. ",
        "Future research may learn from replications and build on them. ",
        "Manual inspection of these articles may help to assess what led to the described outcome."
      )

   entries <- vapply(seq_len(n), function(i) {
      r <- rows[i, ]
      quote_source_line <- if (!is.na(r$outcome_quote_source)) paste0("\n**Quote source:** \"", 
                                                                      r$outcome_quote_source, "\"") else ""
      paste0(
        "**Replication article reference:** ", r$apa_ref_r, "\n",
        "**Outcome:** \"", r$outcome, "\"\n",
        "**Outcome quote:** ", r$outcome_quote,
        quote_source_line
      )
    }, character(1))
    

    footer <- paste0(
      "FLoRA database is available online: https://dx.doi.org/10.17605/OSF.IO/9r62x\n",
      "We describe why and how we submitted these automated comments here: ",
      "https://github.com/forrtproject/flora-pubpeer/blob/main/README.md\n\n",
      "FLoRA Notify Team"
    )

    messages[[doi]] <- paste(c(header, entries, footer), collapse = "\n\n")
  }

  messages
}
```

# create message
```{r}
msgs <- generate_flora_messages(df_rand50)
msgs_df <- data.frame(
  doi_o   = names(msgs),
  message = unlist(msgs),
  row.names = NULL,
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)
msgs_df %>% filter(doi_o=="10.1016/j.obhdp.2006.10.001")
readr::write_csv(msgs_df, "msgs.csv")


```
:::
